Input.value: { path: 'MaterialRelQuan', type: 'sap.ui.model.odata.type.Decimal', constraints: { precision: 12, minimum: '0', minimumExclusive: true, scale: 'variable' } }

Input.app:mandatoryErrorMessage: Please Enter the Reported Contact Number
